channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: FaZe Signs Neityu As Stand In After Karrigan’s Departure
item.content:encoded:
FaZe Clan has announced the temporary signing of French rifler Ryan ‘Neityu⁠’ Aubry for its Counter-Strike 2 (CS2) roster.

This is to fill the gap left by the legendary IGL Finn ‘Karrigan’ Andersen’s departure to Team Falcons, which was confirmed earlier this week.

After being benched by ENCE, Neityu will represent FaZe for the organisation’s next three tournaments: BLAST Rivals Season 1, IEM Atlanta, and Stake Ranked Episode 2.

Falcons will not be participating in any of those three events, so the grudge match will have to wait.

With Neityu joining, it appears likely that Russel ‘Twistzz’ Van Dulken will take over the IGL role for FaZe once again.

Neityu Joins FaZe Clan

Neityu is joining FaZe for the entirety of May after spending over a month on the sidelines.

ENCE, ranked 125 in the Valve Global Rankings, benched Neityu and the entirety of its lineup on March 11, 2026, in favour of developing talent from the team’s local Finnish scene.

The 20-year-old Neityu spent 18 months with ENCE and sported an average rating of 1.06 during that time.

With them, he won the Elisa Masters Espoo 2024, which featured a mix of Tier 1 and 2 teams, after defeating HEROIC 3-1 in the final.

Before ENCE, Neityu also proved himself as quite a promising prospect while playing for MOUZ NXT.

FaZe likely picked up Neityu due to his connection to the team’s new coach, Niclas ‘enkay J⁠’ Krumhorn.

Enkay J joined FaZe on April 16 after he was also dropped by ENCE back in March.

Now, both Neityu and enkay J will make their FaZe debuts when the team face Natus Vincere at BLAST Rivals Fort Worth on April 29.

Everything you need to know about BLAST Rivals Fort Worth has already been confirmed, including the teams and format.

What do you think of this signing for FaZe? Does Neityu deserve a permanent shot, or is there someone else you hope they sign? Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Today’s Wordle #1770: Hints and Answer for April 24, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Today’s tips and strategies can help you solve it faster and maintain your streak—if you’re open to a little extra help. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Wordle, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answer for Wordle Game #1770 for April 24, 2026

To play today’s Wordle, head to the game’s website. If you want to go right to today’s answer without any tips or tricks, you can click right here.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s and yesterday’s editions of Wordle. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Wordle

Wordle is a simple but addictive word puzzle. Each day, players have to guess a five-letter word answer in no more than six attempts. After each guess:

  • Green letters are correct and in the right position.
  • Yellow letters are correct, but in the wrong position.
  • Gray letters are not in the word at all.

The goal is to guess the word in as few tries as possible. Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Wordle can only be played on the New York Times website. There is currently no app for you to download the official game.

Wordle Hints For Today, April 24, 2026

Today’s Wordle answer for game #1770 is slightly challenging. According to the NY Times Wordle review, today’s answer takes an average of 4.3 out of 6 guesses. That’s a little higher than the 3.8-guess average from April 23.

General Wordle Hints For April 24

Without giving today’s Wordle answer completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: It describes someone affected by too much alcohol.
  • Hint 2: It often involves impaired judgment and coordination.
  • Hint 3: The term can be used both casually and seriously, depending on context.
  • Hint 4: You might associate it with parties, bars, or celebrations.

Use these clues to narrow down your guesses and increase your chances of solving Wordle #1770 for April 24, 2026.

Starter Words For April 24, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Wordle answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you figure out some included letters. A few starter words that may help are:

  • ROUND
  • DUNKS
  • DRUID
  • TRUNK
  • DRANK

Today’s Wordle Answer For Game #1770 On April 24, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answer to today’s Wordle below.

Answer: DRUNK

If you solved today’s Wordle without our answer, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

What Does Today’s Wordle Answer Mean?

DRUNK is an adjective that means “being in a temporary state in which one’s physical and mental faculties are impaired by an excess of alcohol.” or “overcome or dominated by a strong feeling or emotion.”

TWEET is a noun that means “a weak chirping sound, as of a young or small bird.”

Yesterday’s Wordle Answer

If you missed the previous game, here’s yesterday’s Wordle answer for Game #1769 on April 23, 2026

Answer: TWEET

While not always the case, looking at previous words can sometimes give you insight into common patterns or letter usage in Wordle puzzles.

When Is The Next Wordle Game After #1770

Wordle games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours before to give players a heads up. The game on April 25 will be Wordle Game #1771.

What Is Wordle?

Wordle is a daily word puzzle created by Josh Wardle. Initially developed as a prototype in 2013, it wasn’t fully released until 2021. The game challenges players to guess a five-letter word in six tries or fewer, using hints from each attempt to narrow down the answer. Its straightforward concept, accessibility, and the thrill of solving a new puzzle each day helped it surge in popularity by late 2021. The success of Wordle inspired numerous spin-offs and social media challenges, leading to its acquisition by The New York Times in early 2022.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our weekly newsletter.

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw
